feed.title: QualCanvas — Changelog
feed.subtitle: What we've shipped. New entry per feature or every two weeks.

entry.title: Methodology field guide — six chapters live
entry.summary: Full set of methodology chapters at /methodology, ~11,000 words across foundations, thematic analysis, grounded theory, IPA, intercoder reliability, and ethics in practice.

entry.title: Marketing site refresh — Tier 2 brand activated
entry.summary: The marketing surface is now on the Ink + Ochre palette with Fraunces display headings. Visible via override URL today; default-on flip at Phase 5 launch.

entry.title: Onboarding, command palette, and the AI code suggester
entry.summary: Two-screen onboarding with methodology templates, an activity bar with Cmd-K coverage across the canvas, and an inline AI code suggester that fires on text highlight.

entry.title: Krippendorff's α, Fleiss' κ, and the reliability batch
entry.summary: Multi-coder agreement statistics expanded. Plus LLM retries with backoff, Stripe webhook reconciliation, a service-worker update toast, and weekly prod Postgres backups to R2.

entry.title: 14-day Pro trial + countdown banner
entry.summary: New signups start on a 14-day Pro trial with a tone-shifting countdown banner, plus an invoice.payment_succeeded webhook handler.

entry.title: Security audit — high, medium, and low findings resolved
entry.summary: Encrypted integration OAuth tokens, prod sourcemaps stripped, two IDOR routes patched, session invalidation propagates on credential change, structured logger and request-ID propagation throughout.

entry.title: JWT → httpOnly cookies migration
entry.summary: Authentication tokens move from localStorage into httpOnly cookies, closing the XSS-exfiltration surface. Plan-aware onboarding ships alongside.

entry.title: Sibling-app cross-linking + activation telemetry
entry.summary: Footer cross-links to sibling JMS Dev Lab products, marketing prerender for crawler visibility, server-side activation telemetry for sign_up and first_canvas_created events.
